global.description: An ad for EarnPath that features a solid blue background covering the entire canvas, creating a calm and professional atmosphere. In the top left corner, there is the EarnPath logo, which is a light blue rounded rectangle with the text 'EarnPath' in white, standing out against a darker blue background. This logo is positioned prominently, establishing brand identity right at the start. In the center of the ad, there are several decorative elements, including a large light blue rectangle that overlaps a medium-sized light blue circle, creating a layered effect. This rectangle has a thin blue outline and is filled with a lighter shade of blue, while the circle has a darker blue outline, enhancing the visual depth. Below these shapes, the main text is displayed prominently in the middle of the ad. This text consists of a large, bold white phrase reading 'Track every euro,' which serves as the core message of the ad, conveying the primary function of the EarnPath service. Beneath this, in smaller white text, the phrase 'Built for peace of mind' adds a reassuring tone to the message. At the bottom of the ad, we see a clear call to action in the form of a white rounded rectangle button with the text 'Start now' in bold black font. This button is positioned towards the bottom center of the ad, slightly elevated from the bottom edge, making it easily accessible and inviting for users to engage with the service. Additionally, in the top left corner, there is a small black text reading 'UGC,' which is relatively small in size and appears above the main content, possibly indicating user-generated content or feedback. Overall, the ad is structured to guide the viewer's eye from the brand logo at the top, through the main message in the center, and down to the call to action at the bottom, creating a cohesive and effective visual flow.
global.main_message: Track every euro with EarnPath for peace of mind.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: Solid blue background covering the full canvas.

elements.label: EarnPath Logo
elements.description: A light blue rounded rectangle with the text 'EarnPath' in white, positioned at the top left corner of the ad. The background is a darker blue, creating contrast with the logo.

elements.label: Blue Shapes
elements.description: A large light blue rectangle positioned slightly to the right, overlapping a medium-sized light blue circle on the left. The rectangle has a thin blue outline and is filled with a lighter shade of blue. The circle has a darker blue outline and is partially overlapping the rectangle, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: Blue Circle and Rectangle
elements.description: A large light blue circle is positioned towards the left side of the element, partially overlapping a smaller solid blue circle at the bottom left. Next to it, there is a light blue rectangle with rounded corners, placed towards the right side of the circle. The overall background is a darker blue, creating a contrast with the lighter shapes.

elements.label: Light Blue Circle
elements.description: A light blue circle with a solid fill, positioned towards the bottom left of the ad. It has a smooth, rounded shape and is placed against a darker blue background.

elements.label: Main Text
elements.description: A large, bold white text reading 'Track every euro' is centered within a light blue rectangular area. Below it, in smaller white text, is the phrase 'Built for peace of mind'. The text is positioned prominently in the middle of the ad, creating a clear focal point against the blue background.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Start Now Button
elements.description: A white rounded rectangle button with the text 'Start now' in bold black font. It is positioned towards the bottom center of the ad, slightly elevated from the bottom edge, creating a clear call to action.

elements.label: EarnPath text logo
elements.description: The element is a light blue text displaying 'EarnPath' in a bold font. It is positioned at the top left corner of the ad, occupying a small area. The text is clear and stands out against the darker blue background.

elements.label: UGC Text
elements.description: The element is a black text reading 'UGC', positioned in the top left corner of the ad. It is set against a blue background and is relatively small in size, appearing above the main content of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: This ad for EarnPath showcases a solid blue background with a prominent logo, layered decorative elements, and a clear call to action, emphasizing the service's reliability.
